title: Is It a Max-Heap?
description: Given an array representation of a binary tree (1-indexed, root at index 1), determine if it satisfies the max-heap property: every parent is ≥ its children.
inputSpec: First line: n. Second line: n integers (the array, 1-indexed from left to right).

botCodes.code:
n=int(input())
a=[0]+list(map(int,input().split()))
ok=True
for i in range(1,n+1):
    if 2*i<=n and a[i]<a[2*i]:ok=False
    if 2*i+1<=n and a[i]<a[2*i+1]:ok=False
print('YES' if ok else 'NO')

let()=let n=Scanf.scanf" %d" Fun.id in let a=Array.make(n+2)0 in for i=1 to n do a.(i)<-Scanf.scanf" %d" Fun.id done;let ok=ref true in for i=1 to n do if 2*i<=n&&a.(i)<a.(2*i)then ok:=false;if 2*i+1<=n&&a.(i)<a.(2*i+1)then ok:=false done;print_endline(if !ok then"YES" else"NO")
